title: althaea indica
intro: Althaea indica, also known as the Indian marshmallow or the khair tree, is a perennial plant native to the Indian subcontinent and parts of Southeast Asia. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and demulcent effects. The health benefits of Althaea indica include soothing digestive issues, reducing coughs and sore throats, and alleviating skin irritations. Althaea indica can be prepared into herbal remedies, such as teas, syrups, and ointments, which can be used to treat a variety of health conditions.
